lastSession.summary: Fixed footer attribution: corrected grammar to 'Izdelala Futuristica', removed d.o.o. suffix.

backlog.title: Google Search Console setup
backlog.desc: Add verification token to layout.tsx metadata.verification.google, submit sitemap at https://www.aikrpan.com/sitemap.xml

backlog.title: Connect custom domain aikrpan.com to Vercel
backlog.desc: Vercel → Settings → Domains → add aikrpan.com and www.aikrpan.com. Update DNS at registrar.

backlog.title: Add analytics
backlog.desc: Vercel Analytics or Google Analytics. Skip for now.

backlog.title: Create privacy policy page
backlog.desc: Footer links to /zasebnost/ but page doesn't exist yet. Needs content for Politika zasebnosti.

backlog.title: Add content to remaining placeholder pages
backlog.desc: 9 pages still have ContentPlaceholder: odpoved, odpravnina, regres, minimalna-placa, pogodbe, dedovanje, druzinsko-pravo, za-podjetja, za-pravnike, brezplacna-pravna-pomoc, blog. Regres and minimalna-placa need yearly updates each January.

backlog.title: next lint fails with spaces in project path
backlog.desc: next lint parses path incorrectly when working dir contains spaces (iCloud Drive). Works fine on Vercel. Low priority — only affects local DX.

backlog.title: Refactor navodila/page.tsx to use ContentLayout
backlog.desc: navodila/page.tsx (357 lines) still manually renders breadcrumbs, nav, footer, CTA — all duplicated from ContentLayout. Needs ContentLayout to accept optional sectionLabel, ctaTitle/ctaDescription props for customization.

backlog.title: Get proper headshot for Aleksander Kumer
backlog.desc: Current founder photo is a group award ceremony shot cropped via CSS object-position. A dedicated professional headshot would look better on homepage and /o-meni/ page.

backlog.title: Unify pricing CTA button text
backlog.desc: Buttons currently say Začnite z MINI, Izberite STANDARD, etc. Agreed to unify to 'Izberi →' for all plans except Po meri which stays 'Kontaktirajte nas →'.

shipped: Footer: fixed attribution to 'Izdelala Futuristica' (correct Slovenian grammar, removed d.o.o.)
MediaMentions: inline 32x32 favicons next to outlet name, removed bordered thumbnail boxes
Models: unified category badge colors to warm accent (bg-warm-pale text-[#8A6040])
MediaMentions: self-hosted site favicons replacing article thumbnails (optimized, zero external requests)
Color scheme migration: sage green → warm accent (#BF7A3B) with dark primary (#2A2520) across all components
Hero chat: stacking conversations with auto-scroll, no user scroll (overflow:hidden + programmatic scrollTop)
Media mentions section with article thumbnails + founder section with /o-meni/ E-E-A-T page
Brand refresh: AK monogram logo, favicons, and OG social image
Mobile optimization: responsive padding, card layouts for Models/Pricing tables, touch targets, font sizing, HeroChat height
Navodila: added 6th step (Preverite vire) to fill 3-col grid
